user_system_path: Between rungs. The NEXT_SESSION_HARDENING mission (#420) shipped as #426/#428/#430/#433. Since then: PR #441 greened the two frontend config-gate tests; PR #442 merged the 4 low-risk dependabot bumps; and the Stripe SDK was upgraded 18.5.0->22.2.2 (apiVersion intentionally held at '2025-08-27.basil' — pure library update, no API-behavior change). All dependabot PRs are now resolved. Owner-gated items remain: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + Slack/CRON env in Vercel Production, Supabase auth toggles (leaked-password/MFA), the paid Tier-1 selection layer. Optional future seam: migrate the Stripe apiVersion basil->dahlia with live verification. Constraint: NO paid API calls — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: Between rungs — only control-plane + docs may change until the owner names the next seam (which re-scopes this contract).
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/schema/deps changes without an active seam + scoped contract.
acceptance_condition: Control plane is consistent in the between-rungs form (build-order active_issue: none, contract active_issue: none, no active-seam line in ACTIVE_HANDOFF) and gate:continuity passes.
stop_condition: Stop when the control plane is rolled forward to a clean between-rungs state and the owner has the final scorecard.
next_command: New session: read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md; the owner names the next seam. Repo is hardened, config gates green, all dependabot PRs resolved (incl. Stripe 18->22). Optional future seam: Stripe apiVersion basil->dahlia migration. Owner-side unlock: set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in Vercel Production.
